description: Create a two-column contents and research methodology slide with a table of contents on the left and KPI/text overview of the EY Risk Transformation series on the right.

right.title:
Research methodology
About the EY Risk Transformation series
right.body: Key figures: 50+ interviews; 28 senior risk management executives; 15+ leaders from the EY Risk Consulting practice; 1,200 survey respondents. This article is part of the EY Risk Transformation series. This series explores the symbiosis of risk and strategy by identifying and learning from the behaviors and mindsets of Risk Strategist firms, a group of companies that approach risk management in more strategic ways than Risk Traditionalists.
